sheet.text: Details Inspector Pinned to W1 Validation status: TBD Close 13-actor demo operator-family precision Decision Metrics Evidence Selected replay window LEO review focus State 1 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T08:58:54.236Z Sim replay 00:07 / 01:54 Source provenance Decision · State Evidence Just connected OneWeb LEO · LEO review focus Just connected to OneWeb LEO with strong link quality. In ~22 min, geometry change triggers signal degradation. NowLEO is the sole primary focus in this window. WhyGeometry supports LEO; pressure window has not started. NextNext focus: LEO quality drop. WatchWatch the LEO focus cue and simulated service time, not measured throughput. The simulation review is currently anchored on the OneWeb LEO context marked as the focus role. The five-state V4.6D model is in window 1 of 5. Watch the LEO actor for the early pressure signal — the next modeled state is LEO pressure. Endpoint precision remains operator-family only and no active gateway is being claimed. Boundary · Truth Boundary Truth boundary Simulation boundary: 13-actor demo, repo-owned projection, not measured truth. Service-layer boundary: modeled service handover, not native RF handover. Endpoint boundary: operator-family precision, not site-level gateway claim. Scale boundary: not >=500 LEO validation and not 24h hardware-GPU closeout. simulation output operator-family precision display-context actors Simulated display-context state, not an operator handover log. Source-lineaged display-context actors, not active serving satellites. Endpoint precision stays operator-family only. No active gateway assignment is claimed. No pair-specific teleport path is claimed. No measured latency, jitter, throughput, or continuity values are shown. No native RF handover is claimed. Implementation evidence
